note: Real Greater Vancouver presale incentives, curated from public developer marketing pages. Not MLS-licensed data — no CREA display restriction. Incentive figures are developer-published and time-limited; a specialist confirms current terms with the developer before a client relies on them.

deals.detail: A $100,000 year-end incentive package on remaining homes at this West Side Vancouver development.
$15,000 off all homes, one year of free strata fees, and a reduced 2.5% deposit — a limited-time stack.
Eligible first-time buyers can receive up to $50,000 back through the new-home GST rebate.
Eligible first-time home buyers save up to $50,000 with the GST removed on these Willoughby townhomes.
$10,000 off all one-bedroom homes and $15,000 off all two-bedroom homes, for a limited time.
A 5% credit on all homes — designed to offset GST and Property Transfer Tax on a primary residence.
